name: Celery Seed Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon celery seed or poppy seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except oil and seeds in a blender container.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. On low speed, continue blending while slowly adding the oil.
4. Stir in the seeds.
5. Chill to allow flavors to blend.
Makes about 1 cup.
Suggested Serving: Serve with various types of fresh fruit salads.
